name: get2know-cms
title: get2know.io CMS
description: Payload CMS + Postgres backing get2know.io (first-party; not published to the public catalog).

defaultEnv.description: Payload encryption secret. Generate one, e.g. `openssl rand -hex 32`.
Password for the `payload` Postgres role (used by both services).
Optional: webhook that triggers the Amplify static rebuild when content is published. Leave blank to disable.
